steps.t: You have come with some Eglain warriors to the Spring of the Red-maid. Here it may be that you can remove the corruption that encircles the carving of…
You know beyond any doubt: this is the shade of Darothild, who fell at the Spring of the Red-maid.
Darothild's shade stands before you at the Spring of the Red-maid, where she lost her final battle. Walgar has asked you to show the corrupted sculptu…
Walgar is at the Spring of the Red-maid.
